llm_judge.verdict: SAARTHI ITSM demonstrates exceptional performance in ticket routing and classification, underpinned by a robust architecture and flawless handling of security-critical incidents, though latency presents a minor area for optimization.
strengths: High routing accuracy (94%) and strong classification performance (0.924 macro-F1).
Excellent security posture with zero H3 downgrades, ensuring critical tickets are handled appropriately.
Robust architectural design, indicated by a 9.2/10 average on the architecture checklist.
Effective hybrid classification approach leveraging keyword, Gemini, and RAG for comprehensive analysis.
improvements: Optimize average latency (13.95s) to enhance real-time ticket processing speed.
Address specific misclassification patterns, particularly between closely related departments like Application/Infrastructure and Network/Access Management.
Further document and explore explicit fairness and bias mitigation strategies to strengthen Responsible AI aspects.

LLD Pipeline Order.detail: Guardrail → Retrieval → Classifier → Router → Resolver → Supervisor (ticket_service.py)

Deterministic Routing.detail: RouterAgent uses cached routing_rules.json — O(1) hash lookup, no LLM

Security Guardrail.detail: PII redaction + injection regex + Gemini scan; pipeline halt on SECURITY_FAIL

Privacy / PII.detail: Email, phone, secrets redacted before retrieval and downstream LLM

Responsible AI.detail: low_grounding flags, Hand 3 human review, audit trail per agent step

Ethical AI.detail: No auto-assign without grace period; transparent hand/department on every ticket

RAG Grounding.detail: Chroma + keyword Jaccard + rag_gate trusted match before Hand 1

Scalability.detail: Chroma ANN O(log n), process caches, background index warm, SQLite → Postgres-ready ORM

Cost Efficiency.detail: Local ONNX embeddings (MiniLM), keyword short-circuit, resolver skips LLM on RAG hit

Open Source / Offline.detail: RAG_EMBEDDING_BACKEND=local, Chroma, keyword index — demo without embed API

API Integration Ready.detail: Gemini client swappable; settings-driven models; SMTP hooks for notifications

Dynamic Configuration.detail: routing_rules.json, supervisor_mode, rag_corpus_mode, department taxonomy via config

UC1 Use Case Alignment.detail: Three Hands, dept queues, employee + agent + admin portals, specialists desk

cases.title: Seller Central listing upload API errors
cases.description: Amazon Seller Central bulk listing upload API returns HTTP 503 for India marketplace sellers. Peak sale event starts in 2 hours.

cases.title: AWS WorkSpaces client disconnect loop on macOS
cases.description: AWS WorkSpaces client disconnects every 5 minutes on macOS Sonoma. Remote merchandising team cannot access catalog tools.

cases.description: Amazon Redshift RA3 cluster disk full on analytics schema. Nightly ETL for demand forecast failing.

cases.description: Aurora PostgreSQL read replica lag exceeds 15 minutes on order pipeline. Checkout microservice reading stale inventory.
